1 Communications/hearing patterns: modes of expression - writing messages. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
144 C3C C3C_SIGN_LANG (C3C) American Sign Language/Braille CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: modes of expression - American Sign language/Braille. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
145 C3D C3D_GESTURES (C3D) Signs/Gestures/Sounds CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: modes of expression - signs/gestures/sounds. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
